allow: Bash(firecrawl search "GitHub Python library academic paper analysis bibliometrics DBLP arxiv" --categories github --limit 15 --json -o .firecrawl/survey/paper-analysis-libs.json)
Bash(gh search repos "paper analysis python" --limit 10 --json name,description,url,stargazersCount)

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''\\n''.join\([f""{r[''full_name'']} \({r[''stargazers_count'']} stars\)"" + ''\\n  '' + r[''description''][:150] for r in data[''items''][:15]]\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''\\n''.join\([f""{r[''full_name'']} \({r[''stargazers_count'']} stars\)"" + ''\\n  '' + \(r[''description''] or ''''\) r in data[''[:150] foritems''][:15]]\)\)")
Bash(gh search repos "paper trend analysis visualization" --limit 20 --sort stars)
Bash(gh search repos "CCF conference paper analysis" --limit 10 --json fullName,description,stargazersCount,language,topics)
Bash(firecrawl search "site:github.com academic paper trend analysis visualization" --limit 20 --categories github -o .firecrawl/search-github-trends.json --json)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''\\n''.join\([f""{i+1}. {x[''name'']} \(★{x[''stargazers_count'']}\): {x[''description'']}"" for i,x in enumerate\(d[''items''][:20]\)]\)\)")
